title: Best 2K Pet Camera for Crisp Detail
meta: When 1080p isn't enough — 2K pet cameras that show fur, tags and mischief clearly.
intro: If you want to read a collar tag or see exactly what your pet grabbed, 2K detail helps. We weighed it against bandwidth and price.

sections.body: Identifying small objects, reading tags, zooming without pixelation.
2K uses more storage and Wi-Fi; ensure your network handles it.
Some '2K' cams cap live view at 1080p; check spec sheets.

faq.a: If detail matters to you, yes; otherwise 1080p is fine.
Yes — 2K clips are larger; size the SD card up.
